notes:
Ember 1.5.0 — Norton-style security suite

• Security Dashboard (Settings → Security): one 0-100 score across every protection — real-time antivirus, fileless/behavioral, smart-firewall network monitoring, Safe Web, software updates, password vault, VPN, AI safe-open and auto-lockdown — with a letter grade and prioritised fixes.
• Software Updater: lists outdated apps + pending OS updates (read-only; never installs).
• Dark-web monitoring surfaced in the dashboard (breach check for your email).

With Ember's existing antivirus, smart-firewall scan, VPN, password vault, breach checks, cleanup and the emergency lockdown (1.4.0), this covers the bulk of Norton 360's consumer features — locally and privately.
